query_normalized: exploring the convergence of iterated function systems with non-contractive maps mathematics
rationale: This paper falls under acceptance category (a) and (b) - it studies the same mathematical mechanism (convergence properties of Iterated Function Systems) on the same domain (function systems/fractal geometry), even though it uses alternative terminology ("sequences of function systems," "trajectories," "non-stationary subdivision") rather than explicitly stating "non-contractive maps."
